title: antirrhinum majus subsp. striatum
intro: Antirrhinum majus subsp. striatum, also known as the striped snapdragon, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Antirrhinum majus subsp. striatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
